title: AI Engineering Intern
description: @ Noah's Ark Lab - Built VLA models for robotic task execution, combining LLM-based planning with fine-tuned low-level control policies to for household tasks through advanced simulation environments.

title: Software Developer Intern
description: Developed scalable applications for the Contact Center Technology team, focusing on enhancing a data dashboard and the Interactive Voice Assistant platform. Optimized backend performance, implemented real-time data streaming, and resolved security vulnerabilities.

title: Research Intern
description: Engineered a flexible 3D rendering toolkit to generate datasets for training and evaluating vision-language models on spatial reasoning, first-authored a research paper published in ACL 2025, and released the toolkit publicly.

title: Machine Learning Researcher
description: Researched social media discussions on diseases using data collection tools and machine learning models for sentiment analysis and topic modeling at the Artificial Intelligence and Mathematical Modeling Lab. First-authored a research paper published in JMIR.

title: Freelance AI Trainer
description: Worked on paid tasks including prompt engineering and model evaluation to train and improve AI models.

title: Baker & Barista
description: Worked at the Don Mills Hazukido Store; responsible for baking pastries, preparing drinks, handling cash, and providing customer service.
